name: devotts
description: DevOtts marketplace for Claude Code plugins. Add this repo, then install review-it (the QA front door) — shares the `devotts` namespace with fable-it and plan-it.

plugins.name: review-it
plugins.description: The QA front door of the DevOtts lifecycle family — plan-it plans, fable-it builds, review-it verifies. Runs the plan-phase Test Contract to prove the build obeys the plan, enforces an 11-rule gate catalog (wrong-layer verification, presence-vs-operability, single-read evidence, narration-as-proof, oracle provenance…), verifies third-party side-effects and staging/prod deploys, and emits one evidence-backed report format shared with fable-it.
